title: Imperial Navy Command Officer's School
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Imperial Navy Command Officer's School''' was a senior facilities for training prospective [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] ship [[Captain/Legends|captains]] in advanced naval combat and military command. It was on the planet [[Carida/Legends|Carida]], and was wiped out when [[Kyp Durron]] used the [[Sun Crusher]] to destroy Carida.

==Appearances==
*''[[Champions of the Force]]''
